from typing import List, Optional, Dict, Any

def collect_names(users: List[dict], role: Optional[str] = None, active: Optional[bool] = None) -> List[str]:
    names = []
    for user in users:
        if role != None and user.get("role") != role:
            continue
        if active != None and user.get("active") != active:
            continue
        names.append(user["name"])
    return names

def find_user(users: List[dict], user_id: int) -> Optional[dict]:
    for user in users:
        if user["id"] == user_id:
            return user
    return None

def get_setting(config: dict, key: str) -> Optional[Any]:
    value = config.get(key)
    if value == None:
        return config.get("default_" + key)
    return value

def process_items(items: List[dict]) -> List[dict]:
    results = []
    for item in items:
        if item.get("status") != None and item["status"] != "active":
            continue
        if item.get("amount") != None and item["amount"] <= 0:
            continue
        results.append(item)
    return results

def filter_by_category(products: List[dict], category: Optional[str]) -> List[dict]:
    if category == None:
        return products
    return [p for p in products if p.get("category") == category]
